center.name: Eastern Arc forests
center.summary: Eastern Arc forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Waller's starling、Bertram's weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Eastern Arc forests and mountains of Malawi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bioko, the Albertine Rift montane forests, the East African montane forests and the Eastern Arc forests
